name: Agent Primitives
description: Three lifecycle tools the agent can call: sleep (yield for delayed re-invocation), dream (consolidate trail.log → memory.md), compact (graceful handoff at context-ceiling). All three write coordination state into a .swarm/ directory; full host-integration (e.g., scheduler-driven re-invocation for sleep, fresh-context restart for compact) is intentionally out of scope for the plugin and tracked under oasis-x ORG-050.

swarmDir.description: Directory for .swarm/ trail + state writes. Default: $PWD/.swarm if it exists, else ~/.openclaw/.swarm

historyDir.description: Directory containing recent session JSONL transcripts that dream() will summarize. Default: ~/.openclaw/logs/history
